PowerShell(cd E:\\projects\\habits-main; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-Content backend_test.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item backend_test.log, backend_test_err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess)
